task_completion.description: Log into the NOSH ChartingSystem using admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Access the patient's demographics or provider assignment section.

task_completion.description: Select Dr. James Carter as the new primary provider.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the new primary provider is assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification or the patient's profile/demographics page explicitly listing 'Dr. James Carter' (or 'James Carter') as the primary provider instead of 'Dr. Sarah Admin'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct SQL commands to update the database.
